message:
test(uds): expand from 25 to 42 tests for Unix domain socket wrappers (wa-183a8)

Add 17 new tests covering: write return values, flush on clean stream,
read into zero-length buffer, nonblocking accept (WouldBlock), listener
local_addr, read/write timeout configuration, read timeout triggering,
bind-when-exists error, connect-to-regular-file error, 64KB data
transfer, nonblocking mode toggle, multiple flush calls, rapid
sequential connects, shutdown-write causing EOF on peer, peer_addr
access, and interleaved empty/real writes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
